name_cn:
Chanel 23k Autumn/Winter New AS4469: Eye-catching!
In this season, Chanel brings many surprises! From classic to new arrivals, every piece is heart-stopping.
First, of course, is the main model of the season--Chanel 23k Autumn/Winter New Handle Box Bag. Its design is simple and elegant, classic yet fashionable, easily holding up any outfit, making you the focus in any occasion. Size: 10.5×17×8cm
